title: chat_create Group: validate member_ids elements; chat_update: validate pinned_message_ids elements
description: In chat_create Group variant, member_ids &[&str] is inserted into JSON without validating individual elements for empty string. In chat_update, pinned_message_ids array elements are not validated. Both follow the same pattern as the remove_members/remove_channels guards added in round 8. Fix: add for-loop validation before array insertion.
